name: Ransomware: Ryuk IOC in Flows
notes:
This rule triggers when an IOC (File Hash) related to Ryuk Ransomware is observed.

Note: Ryuk_SHA256, Ryuk_SHA1 and Ryuk_MD5 have been prepopulated. Tune these Reference Sets with relevant IOC.
conditions_text: when the flow matches File Hash is not N/A
when the flow matches REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Ryuk_MD5', "File Hash") or REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Ryuk_SHA256', "File Hash") or REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Ryuk_SHA1', "File Hash") AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Ransomware: Ryuk IOC in Flows on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the flow matches File Hash is not N/A
AND when the flow matches REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Ryuk_MD5', "File Hash") or REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Ryuk_SHA256', "File Hash") or REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Ryuk_SHA1', "File Hash") AQL filter query
RED_list: Event description: An IOC (File Hash) related to Ryuk Ransomware has been observed.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
